title: Language Fix
description: This datapack fixes the differences between item ID's and item display names.
body:
# Language Fix
This datapack fixes the differences between item ID's and item display names

### What this resourcepack fixes
- GUIs
  - Item Hopper -> Hopper
  - Large Chest -> Double Chest
  - Repair & Disenchant -> Grindstone
  - Repair & Name -> Anvil
  - Upgrade Gear -> Smithing Table
- Blocks
  - Mangrove Propagule -> Mangrove Sapling
  - Potted Mangrove Propagule -> Potted Mangrove Sapling
  - Crimson Fungus -> Crimson Sapling
  - Crimson Hyphae -> Crimson Wood
  - Crimson Nylium -> Crimson Grass Block
  - Crimson Stem -> Crimson Log
  - Potted Crimson Fungus -> Potted Crimson Sapling
  - Stripped Crimson Hyphae -> Stripped Crimson Wood
  - Stripped Crimson Stem -> Stripped Crimson Log
  - Warped Fungus -> Warped Sapling
  - Warped Hyphae -> Warped Wood
  - Warped Nylium -> Warped Grass Block
  - Warped Stem -> Warped Log
  - Potted Warped Fungus -> Potted Warped Sapling
  - Stripped Warped Hyphae -> Stripped Warped Wood
  - Stripped Warped Stem -> Stripped Warped Log
  - Redstone Comparator -> Comparator
  - Redstone Repeater -> Repeater
  - Compacted Blocks
    - Block of Amethyst -> Amethyst Block
    - Block of Bamboo -> Bamboo Block
    - Block of Coal -> Coal Block
    - Block of Copper -> Copper Block
    - Block of Diamond -> Diamond Block
    - Block of Emerald -> Emerald Block
    - Block of Gold -> Gold Block
    - Block of Iron -> Iron Block
    - Block of Lapis -> Lapis Block
    - Block of Netherite -> Netherite Block
    - Block of Quartz -> Quartz Block
    - Block of Raw Copper -> Raw Copper Block
    - Block of Raw Gold -> Raw Gold Block
    - Block of Raw Iron -> Raw Iron Block
    - Block of Redstone -> Redstone Block
    - Block of Stripped Bamboo -> Stripped Bamboo Block
    - Waxed Block of Copper -> Waxed Copper Block
  - Hay Bale -> Hay Block
  - Deepslate Lapis Lazuli Ore -> Deepslate Lapis Ore
  - Lapis Lazuli Ore -> Lapis Ore
  - Potted Azalea -> Potted Azalea Bush
  - Potted Flowering Azalea -> Potted Flowering Azalea Bush
- Entities
  - Minecarts
    - Minecart with Chest -> Chest Minecart
    - Minecart with Command Block -> Command Block Minecart
    - Minecart with Furnace -> Furnace Minecart
    - Minecart with Hopper -> Hopper Minecart
    - Minecart with Spawner -> Spawner Minecart
    - Minecart with TNT -> TNT Minecart
- Items
  - Minecarts
    - Minecart with Chest -> Chest Minecart
    - Minecart with Command Block -> Command Block Minecart
    - Minecart with Furnace -> Furnace Minecart
    - Minecart with Hopper -> Hopper Minecart
    - Minecart with Spawner -> Spawner Minecart
    - Minecart with TNT -> TNT Minecart
  - Banner Patterns
    - Banner Pattern (Flower Charge) -> Flower Banner Pattern
    - Banner Pattern (Creeper Charge) -> Creeper Banner Pattern
    - Banner Pattern (Skull Charge) -> Skull Banner Pattern
    - Banner Pattern (Thing) -> Thing Banner Pattern
    - Banner Pattern (Globe) -> Globe Banner Pattern
    - Banner Pattern (Snout) -> Snout Banner Pattern
  - Leather Armor
    - Leather Cap -> Leather Helmet
    - Leather Tunic -> Leather Chestplate
    - Leather Pants -> Leather Leggings
  - Steak -> Cooked Beef
  - Eye Of Ender -> Ender Eye
  - Nether Quartz -> Quartz
  - Redstone Dust -> Redstone
  - Turtle Shell -> Turtle Helmet
